title: Step S-SWQT-0003-3: 打包消费者浏览器验收与发布证据边界

items.problemDefinition: 现有 tarball 验收只检查构建与 CSS，不证明已安装发布产物在真实浏览器中呈现和切换主题。
items.requirementsDefinition: nested isolated 与 workspace-hoisted 两种 tarball 消费者都必须 typecheck、build、验证 CSS，并运行 Playwright 主题/状态/图表/边界矩阵。
nonGoals: 不执行私有 registry 发布
不使用或请求发布凭据
items.plainLanguage: 让发布产物在两种真实安装布局中接受和工作区相同的浏览器验收。

candidateOptions.B: 打包后启动浏览器矩阵

recommendedOption.rationale: 可验证运行时解析、渲染与主题交互，而非只验证产物文本。

items.openDecisions: registry 认证为外部后续项，非当前本地验收阻塞。
items.granularityDecision: fine-enough：两个布局共享同一发布态浏览器不变量。
items.testCaseDesign: 每个布局执行现有 8 project Playwright matrix。
items.regressionTestDesign: 包解析、@source、主题运行时或截图失效均会失败。
items.residualRisk: 远端私有 registry 认证和发布策略仍需有凭据的发布者验证。

readiness.reason: tarball、临时消费者与 Playwright 已在仓库可用。

executionContract.expectedChangeSurface: Tarball packing, temporary nested and hoisted consumers, emitted CSS checks, and Playwright browser verification.
executionContract.acceptanceCriteria: Each installation layout typechecks, builds, contains token and component CSS, and passes the eight-project browser matrix against installed tarballs.
executionContract.validationEvidenceRequired: verify:packed-consumer plus its underlying package packs, consumer typecheck/build/CSS checks, and browser results.
executionContract.rollbackNotes: The verifier uses a mkdtemp location and removes only its owned temporary directory in finally; no repository consumer is mutated.

implementationSummary.whatChanged: Extended verify-packed-consumer to install packed ui/ui-tokens tarballs in isolated nested and workspace-hoisted layouts, then execute Playwright against each consumer after CSS checks.
implementationSummary.whySatisfiesStep: This proves actual installed-package runtime resolution, theme switching, rendering, and the CSS scan path in both supported layouts.
implementationSummary.intentionallyUnchanged: No remote publication is attempted; private registry authentication remains an external release responsibility.

changeSurface.configAnchors: examples/ui-consumer/package.json and playwright config are copied into temporary consumers.

executionNotes.decisionsDuringImplementation: Reused the same browser matrix to prevent workspace-only and package-shaped acceptance drift.
executionNotes.risksDiscovered: A missing Bun PATH was isolated to the host session; explicit command PATH was used without changing user shell configuration.

validationReferences.notes: Nested isolated and workspace-hoisted each typechecked, built, checked CSS, then passed 34 browser tests with 6 intentional scope skips.
Source consumer baseline: 34 passed, 6 intentional skips.
Not retried: external credentials are explicitly outside local acceptance.

gateOutcomes.evidence: Verifier only creates and removes its own mkdtemp consumers; no credentials or remote publish attempt.
gateOutcomes.residualRisk: Actual remote registry operation remains outside local scope.

gateOutcomes.evidence: Both nested isolated and workspace-hoisted tarball consumers typecheck, build, verify emitted component/dark CSS, and run 34 pass/6 intentional scope skips browser matrices.
gateOutcomes.residualRisk: Same browser matrix is a targeted UI suite, not every package consumer.

gateOutcomes.evidence: Failure in package resolution, @source scanning, theme runtime, chart, state, or visual baseline fails one of the two installed-consumer matrices.
gateOutcomes.residualRisk: Remote registry auth is excluded with explicit owner/trigger.

gateOutcomes.evidence: Docs explain package-shaped local proof and direct private-registry validation to credentialed maintainers; Feature open question carries owner/trigger/risk.
Step sourceFeature is F-SWQT-0003; stable step path is retained and validation evidence recorded.

items.projectCompanionFactDecision: not-needed: companion validation handoff already declares the local gate; documentation captures expanded browser runtime proof.
items.residualRisk: Private remote registry credentials/policy and unrelated historical numbering migration remain bounded follow-ups.
items.followUp: Promote Step 3, then synchronize Feature lifecycle and conduct Feature-level acceptance audit.

items.finalDocumentEntry: .sw/workflow/steps/S-SWQT-0003-3-打包消费者浏览器验收与发布证据边界.json

items.rootMount: Yes - layout v3 stable Step path; no physical archive move.
